zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret d'Umfraville於1152年出生在英國諾圖波藍德普盧多時，她的父親Odinel d'Umfraville II27歲，母親Aveline Lucy32歲。她與William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1208年在英國萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret d'Umfraville于1152年出生在英国諾圖波藍德普盧多时，她的父亲Odinel d'Umfraville II27岁，母亲Aveline Lucy32岁。她与William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1208年在英国萊希斯特斯爾貝爾沃易 卡素享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret d'Umfraville was born in 1152, in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, her father, Odinel d'Umfraville II, was 27 and her mother, Aveline Lucy, was 32. She married William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1208, in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret d'Umfraville est née en 1152, à Prudhoe, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Odinel d'Umfraville II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aveline Lucy, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir à Belvoir, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1208, à Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret d'Umfraville 1152 in Prudhoe, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Odinel d'Umfraville II 27 und ihre Mutter Aveline Lucy 32. Sie hat in Belvoir, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1208 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret d'Umfraville è nata il nel 1152 nel Prudhoe, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Odinel d'Umfraville II, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Aveline Lucy, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir nel Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1208, nel Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Umfravilleが1152年にイギリスノースウンバーランドプルドhオで生まれた時，父Odinel d'Umfraville IIは27歳，母Aveline Lucyは32歳であった。イギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイルでWilliam d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoirと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1208年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアベルボイル カストルで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret d'Umfraville(이)가 1152년 영국 노르스벌랜드 프루드호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Odinel d'Umfraville II(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline Lucy(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 벨보이르에서 William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1208년 영국 레이스스터실르 벨보이르 카스틀에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret d'Umfraville nasceu em 1152, em Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aveline Lucy, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir em Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1208, em Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret d'Umfraville родилась в 1152 г. в местности прудхо, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Odinel d'Umfraville II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aveline Lucy, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir в местности белвоир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1208 г. в местности белвоир кастл, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret d'Umfraville nació en 1152, en Prudhoe, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Odinel d'Umfraville II, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aveline Lucy, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William d'Aubigny Lord of Belvoir en Belvoir, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1208, en Belvoir Castle, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años.
